_comment: Single declared truth for the dev fabric. Global at ~/.claude/fabric.json, read by the loci tools (orient/work/dispatch). Location is fixed (not a walk-up manifest) so it's findable from any cwd; tools walk up from cwd only to detect repo/org locus. The cloud pipeline lives in SuxOS/.github (three-loop-pipeline.md) and is NOT duplicated here — 'pipeline' only points at it.
_identity: Ambient, not looked up: human = m@colinxs.com (desktop, runs as ~/.claude); bot = claude@colinxs.com (cli + cloud, runs as ~/.claude-bot). A session inherits its identity from how it launched.
